message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle rectangle
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 10
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantBorderRadius 5
skinparam participantBorderDashed false
skinparam participantBorderDotted false
skinparam participantBorderDouble false
skinparam participantBorderGroove false
skinparam participantBorderInset false
skinparam participantBorderOutset false
skinparam participantBorderRidge false
skinparam participantBorderSolid true
skinparam participantBorderWidth 1
skinparam participantBorderColor #000000
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantFontStyle plain
skinparam participantFontName Arial
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 10
skinparam participantBorderThickness 1
skinparam participantBorderRadius 5
skinparam participantBorderDashed false
skinparam participantBorderDotted false
skinparam participantBorderDouble false
skinparam participantBorderGroove false
skinparam participantBorderInset false
skinparam participantBorderOutset false
skinparam participantBorderRidge false
skinparam participantBorderSolid true
skinparam participantBorderWidth 1

participant "generate_delta_main.cc" as GDM
participant "delta_diff_generator.cc" as DDG
participant "payload_file.cc" as PF
participant "payload_generation_config.cc" as PGC

GDM -> GDM: brillo::KeyValueStore.Load(file)
GDM -> PGC: payload_config.target.LoadDynamicPartitionMetadata(store)
PGC --> GDM
GDM -> PGC: payload_config.target.ValidateDynamicPartitionMetadata()
PGC --> GDM
GDM -> DDG: GenerateUpdatePayloadFile()
activate DDG
DDG -> PF: payload.Init(config)
activate PF
PF -> PF: manifest_.dynamic_partition_metadata
PF --> DDG
deactivate PF
note right of DDG: generate payload data
DDG -> PF: payload.WritePayload()
activate PF
PF -> PF: manifest_.SerializeToString()
PF -> PF: Write(serialized_manifest.data())
PF --> DDG
deactivate PF
deactivate DDG
GDM --> GDM: done

@enduml
